data.title: Nasdaq moves to remove position limits on Bitcoin, Ether ETF options
data.description:
The filing with the US SEC seeks to eliminate contract caps on crypto ETF options, a change Nasdaq argues would address unequal treatment in derivatives markets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/nasdaq-position-limits-bitcoin-ether-etf-options?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Intel’s stock crashes after soft Q1 revenue and profit outlook disappoints investors
data.description:
Intel got crushed Thursday night. The stock fell hard, down 6% in after-hours trading, after the company posted a brutal first-quarter forecast. This came right after it beat Wall Street estimates for Q4, which you’d think would help. It didn’t. The moment investors saw the weak Q1 guidance, they hit the sell button fast. For […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/intels-stock-crashes-after-soft-earnings/

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer Between Anonymous Addresses Observed
data.description: At 05:20, a transaction involving 500 BTC was recorded, moving from one anonymous address to another. According to ChainCatcher, the initial address began with 3FuUiB1c5fRTU8jw4pRktGzKhi7SrdeNw1, and the receiving address started with 3KsjRnfRpr6V718N7JYtqc9BzNoFan19Pg. Subsequently, a portion of the transferred BTC, specifically 10 BTC, was sent to a third anonymous address, which begins with 3PX3LdJ5kgbHXoy2iRjgKjapBfFicco4uj.

data.title: Crypto Market Shows Early Stabilization Signals in January
data.description:
As of Jan. 21, the broader crypto market is showing early signs of stabilization following weeks of pressure. While price action remains range-bound across major assets, multiple indicators suggest selling intensity has eased. Indeed, a short-term balance is forming between buyers and sellers
source: https://www.techgaged.com/crypto-market-shows-early-stabilization-signals-in-january/

data.title: New Proposal Envisions Base Token With Direct Voting Power Over Coinbase
data.description:
An influential proposal published by CoinDesk has reignited debate around a potential Base network token, arguing that a future asset, often referred to by speculators as BASE, could be structured to give holders direct voting power over Coinbase Global, Inc. itself.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/new-proposal-envisions-base-token-with-direct-voting-power-over-coinbase/
